name: Kathleen Carole Morrison
bio: Kathleen Carole Morrison received a Qualified rating from the Chicago Bar Association. Only one Alliance bar association rated her (Not Qualified), while the majority did not rate her — making her bar association record somewhat limited. Compared to her opponent Dan Balanoff, who received near-universal NR/NQ ratings, Morrison presents as the more bar-supported candidate in this race.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: 1 NQ from Alliance bar associations — limited ratings overall
